output: Completed batch 4 task `T5`. `ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx` no longer tracks `isPinned`, no longer exposes pin or dismiss props/actions, and now gates the remaining actions only by `mode` and final-video availability. task_updates.executor_notes: Simplified `ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx` by removing `isPinned` from `ShotGroupMenuState`, deleting the `onPinGroup` and `onDismissFinalVideo` props, removing the 'Pin as Shot Group' and 'Dismiss reminder' actions, and updating the remaining action gates so Unpin is shown whenever available, Switch to Final Video is shown when `menu.mode !== 'video'`, and Switch to Images is shown when `menu.mode === 'video'`. Static verification: grep finds no remaining `isPinned`, `onPinGroup`, `onDismissFinalVideo`, 'Pin as Shot Group', or 'Dismiss reminder' references in the file, and the new mode-based conditions are present. Full test verification is deferred to T7/T8 because the canvas/test fixtures are updated in that later batch.
commands_run: rg -n "Unpin|Switch to Final Video|Switch to Images|menu\.mode !== 'video'|menu\.mode === 'video'" src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ShotGroupContextMenu.tsx

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. 'Pin as Shot Group' and 'Dismiss reminder' are removed, and the remaining actions are no longer gated on `isPinned`: Unpin depends only on `onUnpinGroup`, Switch to Final Video depends on `menu.hasFinalVideo && menu.mode !== 'video'`, and Switch to Images depends on `menu.mode === 'video'`.
